sections.paragraph:
verb למעוט

to decrease, diminish, grow less; be small

verb למעט

to do seldom

verb להתמעט

become diminished, reduced

verb להמעיט

to underrate; do seldom

verb למעט (>>מיעט)

to do seldom

masculine noun and adjective

little, few, some, handful, oligo, piffling, spot, sprinkle, sprinkling, dab, dash

adverb

a little, a few, little
